templates.title: Generate unit test stub
templates.description: Create a low-risk pytest module under tests/unit for a target module or behavior.
templates.target_hint: Target module or behavior, e.g. src/guppy/api/server.py or instance capabilities
templates.prompt_template: You are preparing a low-risk pytest file for Guppy. Produce a complete Python file and return only one fenced code block. Target: {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Constraints: stay self-contained, prefer smoke-safe assertions, avoid network calls, avoid destructive filesystem actions, and keep comments minimal.

templates.title: Generate smoke test stub
templates.description: Create a low-risk smoke-style test scaffold under tests/smoke.
templates.target_hint: Feature or UI path to smoke test
templates.prompt_template: Create a safe smoke test scaffold for Guppy. Target: {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced Python code block only. Constraints: no external network, no long sleeps, no destructive commands, and keep the test resilient when dependencies are absent.

templates.title: Draft docs follow-up
templates.description: Write a focused markdown follow-up note under docs/generated.
templates.prompt_template: Draft a concise markdown follow-up note for Guppy about {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced markdown block only. Include summary, low-risk next actions, and validation notes.

templates.title: Generate config example
templates.description: Create a non-live example config file under config/generated.
templates.prompt_template: Create a safe example JSON config for Guppy about {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced json block only. Do not include secrets, absolute paths, or production credentials.

templates.title: Draft prompt refresh
templates.description: Create a new low-risk prompt draft under config/offhours_prompts.
templates.prompt_template: Write a prompt draft for Guppy's low-risk automation about {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced markdown block only. Keep it explicit, bounded, and approval-first.

templates.title: Draft regression checklist
templates.description: Create a focused regression checklist under docs/generated for a feature or release slice.
templates.target_hint: Feature area, release gate, or workflow to verify
templates.prompt_template: Draft a concise regression checklist for Guppy covering {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced markdown block only. Include critical paths, edge checks, and validation commands without destructive actions.

templates.title: Draft UI input audit
templates.description: Create a launcher input/button audit note under docs/generated.
templates.target_hint: Launcher view, tab, or workflow to audit
templates.prompt_template: Create a concise UI input and button audit for Guppy focused on {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced markdown block only. Separate live controls, disabled placeholders, and follow-up fixes.

templates.title: Generate fixture example
templates.description: Create a safe fixture/example payload under tests/fixtures for a bounded workflow.
templates.target_hint: Workflow, API response, or UI state to model
templates.prompt_template: Create a safe JSON fixture example for Guppy about {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced json block only. Use representative fake data, no secrets, and keep the schema easy to read.

templates.title: Generate schema example
templates.description: Create a non-live schema example under config/generated.
templates.target_hint: Workflow or config domain needing a sample schema
templates.prompt_template: Create a safe example JSON schema-like document for Guppy about {target_ref}. Output path: {output_path}. Return one fenced json block only. Keep keys descriptive and avoid production-only fields.
